sentences.arabic: كَانَ كَلْبٌ صَغِيرٌ اسْمُهُ بِشَارٌ يَلْعَبُ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je mali pas po imenu Bišar koji se igrao u vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small dog named Bishar who played in the garden.

sentences.arabic: ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ سَقَطَ فِي حُفْرَةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ وَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعِ الْخُرُوجَ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je upao u duboku jamu i nije mogao izaći.
sentences.translationEn: One day he fell into a deep hole and could not get out.

sentences.arabic: نَبَحَ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ فَسَمِعَهُ وَلَدٌ صَغِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: Lajao je glasno i čuo ga je mali dječak.
sentences.translationEn: He barked loudly and a small boy heard him.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الْوَلَدُ بِحَبْلٍ وَأَخْرَجَ بِشَارًا مِنَ الْحُفْرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak je došao s užetom i izvukao Bišara iz jame.
sentences.translationEn: The boy came with a rope and pulled Bishar out of the hole.
